arts.sum: Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community The Blades surrendered top spot to Leeds United on Boxing Day after losing to Burnley at Bramall Lane.

arts.ttl: Paul Warne: I’m confident Derby can beat Leeds United
arts.sum: Derby County boss Paul Warne is feeling confident of his side’s chances of picking up another scalp this week at Pride Park as Leeds United face the Rams. Warne has previewed the Leeds clash this week, in which he has discussed how confident he’s feeling of seeing off the Whites and collecting another impressive scalp after a 2-1 victory over West Brom most recently.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke expects “surprise” as Leeds United prepare for Derby County today
arts.sum: Leeds United take on Derby County this evening looking to round off the calendar year with a third successive win, having won at Stoke on Boxing Day. Leeds swept Paul Warne’s Rams to the side with ease when they met on the 7th of December, but the contrast between home and away form for both sides means that Pride Park should play host to a much different contrast tonight.

arts.ttl: Player Leeds United sold in the summer could be about to join promotion rivals in January
arts.sum: Sunderland are looking to sign a midfielder on loan to add further depth, and while nothing is concrete between Kamara and the Stadium of Light, he’s an option being discussed by Leeds’ promotion rivals. Leeds United sanctioned multiple sales during the summer window after missing out on promotion, but it hasn’t stopped them from being in a strong position for automatic promotion this term.

arts.ttl: Euro club seal transfer agreement amid Leeds United January interest
arts.sum: Rennes had been reported to be interested in signing Illan Meslier from Leeds United this January, but they have instead agreed to sign another Championship promotion-winner in Brice Samba. It leaves them needing a long-term solution, to which Meslier was named as one of their potential options, amid links from the Sun claiming Manchester United are considering a move too.
